name: socialforge
description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), multi-platform copy adaptation, C2PA signing. Installable on Cursor 2.5+ via /add-plugin socialforge@https://github.com/indranilbanerjee/socialforge in any Agent chat.
